violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed loose hanging debris hanging from the ceiling by the soup area.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employee observed putting on gloves without washing hands first.
Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Meatballs left on top of microwave to thaw.

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. First Hot Hold Unit on end that holds pizza and sandwiches had temps of 105-110 F.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors, walls and ceiling needed cleaning more frequent.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Breakfast sandwich was holding in hot unit with time of 110 F. Pizza holding at temp of 100.5 F
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
